notes: Small scaffolding file (244 lines, 12 decls) establishing IsPurelyInseparable for K(E)/Im(π*) via isPurelyInseparable_iff_pow_mem. The set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false on the instance has no justifying comment. The final theorem mulByInt_q_pullback_image_subset_frobenius_of_element_witness is a witness-parametric re-export of a FieldTower.lean lemma; the unconditional form awaits Silverman III.6.1.
